query:
INSERT INTO project_service_instances (projectId, serviceCode, stageCode, plannedStartDate, plannedDueDate, operationalStatus) VALUES
(1, 'SRV-RERA-TRAIN', 'STG-01', '2026-03-10', '2026-03-24', 'in_progress'),
(1, 'SRV-RERA-APPROVAL', 'STG-01', '2026-03-25', '2026-04-01', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-DED-LICENSE', 'STG-01', '2026-04-02', '2026-05-02', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-RERA-DEV-REG', 'STG-01', '2026-05-03', '2026-05-08', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-SETUP-POLICE-CERT', 'STG-01', '2026-05-03', '2026-05-10', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-RERA-PROJ-REG', 'STG-02', '2026-05-11', '2026-05-18', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-ESCROW-OPEN', 'STG-02', '2026-05-19', '2026-05-24', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-FIN-PLAN-APPROVE', 'STG-02', '2026-05-25', '2026-06-01', 'not_started'),
(1, 'SRV-MARKETING-PERMIT', 'STG-02', '2026-06-02', '2026-06-05', 'not_started')
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE plannedStartDate = VALUES(plannedStartDate), plannedDueDate = VALUES(plannedDueDate);
